title: Silent Farms
description: Mutes common farm mobs and noisy blocks while you're AFK.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac347b7e55f3881425ba63524b8294874660b1cf.png)
# Description:
This pack mutes annoying sounds from common farm mobs (zombies, iron golems, creepers, etc.) as well as noisy blocks like pistons and droppers/dispensers. Also adds an "AFK" symbol to your crosshair, guaranteeing you'll never accidentally leave the pack on.
